title: Next Issue State
description: Per-issue state file for the /next-issue pipeline. Written to .claude/memory/tmp/next-issue-{N}.json where N is the issue number.

version.description: Schema version. Always 2 for JSON format (version 1 was YAML frontmatter).

issue.description: Issue number from GitHub or GitLab.

branch.description: Git branch name. Set after Phase 1 (select).

plan.description: One-line plan summary. Set after Phase 2 (plan).

autonomous.description: True when the run was started in autonomous mode (--auto flag or NEXT_ISSUE_AUTONOMOUS=1). Gates resolve to documented defaults; no interactive prompts.

plan_gated.description: True when an autonomous run keeps the human plan-approval checkpoint (EnterPlanMode/ExitPlanMode) instead of skipping it. Set true for autonomous runs on effort/medium, effort/large, severity/critical, or no-effort-label issues, or when --plan-gate is passed; false (fully-autonomous, skip plan) for effort/trivial|small non-critical issues, when --force-auto is passed, and for every non-autonomous run.

plan_comment_url.description: URL of the issue comment where the fully-autonomous plan was posted for traceability. Written only on the fully-autonomous path (plan_gated:false); omitted on plan-gated autonomous runs and all non-autonomous runs.

contexts.description: Domain contexts relevant to this issue (e.g., 'api-design', 'security').

checkpoint.description: Phase transition checkpoint. Written before context reset points to preserve key context for the next phase.

key_decisions.description: Non-obvious choices made during the phase that affect downstream work. Do NOT include things derivable from the code.

files_modified.description: Files changed so far (avoids re-scanning after reset).

files_planned.description: Files that still need to change.

warnings.description: Things discovered that the next phase should know about.

next_action.description: Explicit directive for post-reset pickup (e.g., 'Begin implementation loop: make-it-work').
